channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Eight monks killed in Thailand after 11-year-old boy crashes truck
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- 11-Year-Old Boy Drives Pickup Truck into Procession of Thai Monks and Kills 9
- Boy, 11, Crashes Family Truck Into Thailand Pilgrimage, Killing 9 Buddhist Monks: ‘RIP Kind Souls’
- Nine Buddhist monks killed by child driving truck in Thailand
- 9 Buddhist Monks Killed After Boy Crashes Truck Into Procession
- 9 monks killed after pickup truck driven by 11-year-old hits pilgrimage group in Thailand
- Nine Thai monks killed after boy drives truck into procession
- 11-year-old boy driving pickup truck crashes into group of Thai monks, killing 9
- At least nine monks killed in Thailand after boy drives truck into procession
- 9 Buddhist Monks Killed After Boy Crashes Truck Into Procession
- 11-year-old boy driving pickup truck crashes into group of Thai monks, killing 8
- Eight Thai monks killed after child drives truck into procession
- Eight monks killed in Thailand after 11-year-old boy crashes truck
- 11-year-old boy driving pickup truck crashes into group of Thai monks, killing 8
- Truck driven by juvenile kills 8 monks in northeastern Thailand
- Eight Thai monks killed after boy drives truck into procession: Police
- Eight Thai monks killed after child drives truck into procession
- Eight Thai monks killed after boy drives truck into procession
- 11-year-old boy driving pickup truck crashes into group of Thai monks, killing 8]]>

- Bomb blast at Damascus cafe kills six, authorities say
- Damascus cafe blast kills 5, wounds 16, Syrian state news agency says
- Cafe blast in Damascus kills six, injures 22

- At least 21,000 children killed in Gaza after 1,000 days of war, Save the Children says
- 1,000 days of Israel’s genocide: Gaza children get killed, orphaned and starved]]>

item.title: Taiwan needs to become a ‘hornet’s nest’ of drones, US diplomat says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US diplomat wants to turn Taiwan into ‘hornet’s nest of drones’
- Taiwan needs a ‘hornet’s nest’ of drones to deter conflict, US diplomat says]]>

item.title: Alibaba to pay $600m to settle illegal drug sales allegations in US probe
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Alibaba to pay $600M to settle allegations it allowed illegal drug and equipment sales
- Alibaba, Payment Processor to Pay $600 Million Over Illegal Sales on Its Platforms]]>

item.title: Gaza war’s 1,000 days: 90% of strip ‘destroyed’, 80% ‘seized’ by Israel
item.description: <![CDATA[Importance: 21.8 | Covered by 2 feeds | Reputation: 3.7]]>

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce already wed, report says, party could go till 4am
item.source: South China Morning Post (+1 other sources)
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce already secretly married ahead of Madison Square Garden bash: Report]]>
